document.docAuthor: Navidpour, Shahrokh, Kovařík, František, Soleglad, Michael E. & Fet, Victor
document.masterDocTitle: Scorpions of Iran (Arachnida, Scorpiones). Part X. Alborz, Markazi and Tehran Provinces with a description of Orthochirus carinatus sp. n. (Buthidae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Scorpions of Iran (Arachnida, Scorpiones). Part X. Alborz, Markazi and Tehran Provinces with a description of Orthochirus carinatus sp. n. (Buthidae)

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Razi Reference Laboratory of Scorpion Research, Razi Vaccine & Serum Research Institute, P. O. Box 31975 / 148, Agricultural Research Education and Extension Organization (AREEO)
P. O. Box 27, CZ- 145 01 Praha 45, Czech Republic
Department of Biological Sciences, Marshall University, Huntington, WV 25755, USA

subSubSection.paragraph:
TYPE LOCALITY AND
TYPE REPOSITORY . Iran , Tehran ; MCSN
.

caption.paragraph:
Figures 1–2:
Orthochirus carinatus
sp . n .
, male holotype, dorsal (1) and ventral (1) views. Scale bar: 10 mm.

Figures 3–4:
Orthochirus carinatus
sp . n .
, female paratype from locality No. Al-101, dorsal (3) and ventral (4) views. Scale bar: 10 mm.

DISTRIBUTION: Iran : Chahar Machal & Bakhtiyari , Esfahan , Fars , Hamadan , Hormozgan , Kerman , Kermanshah, Markazi , Mazandaran , Sistan & Baluchistan , Tehran , West Azarbaijan , and Yazd Provinces (see Navidpour et al., 2013: 13 ). There are new records for Alborz Province .
